lines.english: Lesson 44
lines.chinese: 第44课
lines.raw: Lesson 44 | 第44课

lines.english: Speed and comfort
lines.chinese: 速度与舒适
lines.raw: Speed and comfort | 速度与舒适

lines.english: Which type of transport does the writer prefer, do you think?
lines.chinese: 你认为作者更喜欢哪种交通方式？
lines.raw: Which type of transport does the writer prefer, do you think? | 你认为作者更喜欢哪种交通方式？

lines.english: People travelling long distances frequently have to decide whether they would prefer to go by land, sea, or air.
lines.chinese: 长途旅行的人经常不得不决定他们是愿意乘陆路、海路还是空路。
lines.raw: People travelling long distances frequently have to decide whether they would prefer to go by land, sea, or air. | 长途旅行的人经常不得不决定他们是愿意乘陆路、海路还是空路。

lines.english: Hardly anyone can positively enjoy sitting in a train for more than a few hours.
lines.chinese: 几乎没有人会真正喜欢坐几个小时以上的火车。
lines.raw: Hardly anyone can positively enjoy sitting in a train for more than a few hours. | 几乎没有人会真正喜欢坐几个小时以上的火车。

lines.english: Train compartments soon get cramped and stuffy.
lines.chinese: 火车车厢很快就会变得又挤又闷。
lines.raw: Train compartments soon get cramped and stuffy. | 火车车厢很快就会变得又挤又闷。

lines.english: It is almost impossible to take your mind off the journey.
lines.chinese: 几乎不可能不去想旅途。
lines.raw: It is almost impossible to take your mind off the journey. | 几乎不可能不去想旅途。

lines.english: Reading is only a partial solution, for the monotonous rhythm of the wheels clicking on the rails soon lull you to sleep.
lines.chinese: 阅读只是一个部分解决方案，因为车轮在铁轨上单调的咔嗒声很快就会让你昏昏欲睡。
lines.raw: Reading is only a partial solution, for the monotonous rhythm of the wheels clicking on the rails soon lull you to sleep. | 阅读只是一个部分解决方案，因为车轮在铁轨上单调的咔嗒声很快就会让你昏昏欲睡。

lines.english: During the day, sleep comes in snatches.
lines.chinese: 白天，睡眠是断断续续的。
lines.raw: During the day, sleep comes in snatches. | 白天，睡眠是断断续续的。

lines.english: At night, when you really wish to go to sleep, you rarely manage to do so.
lines.chinese: 晚上，当你真正想睡觉时，你却很少能做到。
lines.raw: At night, when you really wish to go to sleep, you rarely manage to do so. | 晚上，当你真正想睡觉时，你却很少能做到。

lines.english: If you are lucky enough to get a sleeper,
lines.chinese: 如果你足够幸运能得到一个卧铺，
lines.raw: If you are lucky enough to get a sleeper, | 如果你足够幸运能得到一个卧铺，

lines.english: you spend half the night staring at the small blue light in the ceiling, or fumbling to find your ticket for inspection.
lines.chinese: 你会花半夜的时间盯着天花板上那盏小蓝灯，或者摸索着找票以备查验。
lines.raw: you spend half the night staring at the small blue light in the ceiling, or fumbling to find your ticket for inspection. | 你会花半夜的时间盯着天花板上那盏小蓝灯，或者摸索着找票以备查验。

lines.english: Inevitably you arrive at your destination almost exhausted.
lines.chinese: 不可避免地，你到达目的地时几乎精疲力尽。
lines.raw: Inevitably you arrive at your destination almost exhausted. | 不可避免地，你到达目的地时几乎精疲力尽。

lines.english: Long car journeys are even less pleasant, for it is quite impossible even to read.
lines.chinese: 长途汽车旅行甚至更不愉快，因为连阅读都是完全不可能的。
lines.raw: Long car journeys are even less pleasant, for it is quite impossible even to read. | 长途汽车旅行甚至更不愉快，因为连阅读都是完全不可能的。

lines.english: On motorways you can, at least, travel fairly safely at high speeds,
lines.chinese: 在高速公路上，你至少可以相当安全地高速行驶，
lines.raw: On motorways you can, at least, travel fairly safely at high speeds, | 在高速公路上，你至少可以相当安全地高速行驶，

lines.english: but more often than not, the greater part of the journey is spent on roads with few service stations and too much traffic.
lines.chinese: 但通常情况下，旅途的大部分时间是在服务站很少且交通拥堵的道路上度过的。
lines.raw: but more often than not, the greater part of the journey is spent on roads with few service stations and too much traffic. | 但通常情况下，旅途的大部分时间是在服务站很少且交通拥堵的道路上度过的。

lines.english: By comparison, ferry trips or cruises offer a great variety of civilized comforts.
lines.chinese: 相比之下，渡轮旅行或邮轮旅行提供了各种文明的舒适享受。
lines.raw: By comparison, ferry trips or cruises offer a great variety of civilized comforts. | 相比之下，渡轮旅行或邮轮旅行提供了各种文明的舒适享受。

lines.english: You can stretch your legs on the spacious decks, play games,
lines.chinese: 你可以在宽敞的甲板上伸展双腿，玩游戏，
lines.raw: You can stretch your legs on the spacious decks, play games, | 你可以在宽敞的甲板上伸展双腿，玩游戏，

lines.english: meet interesting people and enjoy good food--always assuming, of course, that the sea is calm.
lines.chinese: 结识有趣的人，享受美食——当然，前提是海面风平浪静。
lines.raw: meet interesting people and enjoy good food--always assuming, of course, that the sea is calm. | 结识有趣的人，享受美食——当然，前提是海面风平浪静。

lines.english: If it is not, and you are likely to get seasick, no form of transport could be worse.
lines.chinese: 如果不是，而且你很可能会晕船，那么没有哪种交通方式会更糟了。
lines.raw: If it is not, and you are likely to get seasick, no form of transport could be worse. | 如果不是，而且你很可能会晕船，那么没有哪种交通方式会更糟了。

lines.english: Even if you travel in ideal weather, sea journeys take a long time.
lines.chinese: 即使你在理想的天气中旅行，海路旅行也需要很长时间。
lines.raw: Even if you travel in ideal weather, sea journeys take a long time. | 即使你在理想的天气中旅行，海路旅行也需要很长时间。

lines.english: Relatively few people are prepared to sacrifice holiday time for the pleasure of travelling by sea.
lines.chinese: 相对而言，很少有人愿意为了海上旅行的乐趣而牺牲假期时间。
lines.raw: Relatively few people are prepared to sacrifice holiday time for the pleasure of travelling by sea. | 相对而言，很少有人愿意为了海上旅行的乐趣而牺牲假期时间。

lines.english: Aeroplanes have the reputation of being dangerous and even hardened travellers are intimidated by them.
lines.chinese: 飞机有危险的名声，即使是经验丰富的旅行者也会被它们吓倒。
lines.raw: Aeroplanes have the reputation of being dangerous and even hardened travellers are intimidated by them. | 飞机有危险的名声，即使是经验丰富的旅行者也会被它们吓倒。

lines.english: They also have the disadvantage of being an expensive form of transport.
lines.chinese: 它们还有另一个缺点，就是价格昂贵的交通方式。
lines.raw: They also have the disadvantage of being an expensive form of transport. | 它们还有另一个缺点，就是价格昂贵的交通方式。

lines.english: But nothing can match them for speed and comfort.
lines.chinese: 但论速度和舒适度，没有任何交通工具能与它们相比。
lines.raw: But nothing can match them for speed and comfort. | 但论速度和舒适度，没有任何交通工具能与它们相比。

lines.english: Travelling at a height of 30, 000 feet, far above the clouds, and at over 500 miles an hour is an exhilarating experience.
lines.chinese: 在三万英尺高空，远在云层之上，以每小时超过500英里的速度飞行，是一种令人兴奋的体验。
lines.raw: Travelling at a height of 30, 000 feet, far above the clouds, and at over 500 miles an hour is an exhilarating experience. | 在三万英尺高空，远在云层之上，以每小时超过500英里的速度飞行，是一种令人兴奋的体验。

lines.english: You do not have to devise ways of taking your mind off the journey, for an aeroplane gets you to your destination rapidly.
lines.chinese: 你不必绞尽脑汁去分散旅途的注意力，因为飞机能迅速将你送达目的地。
lines.raw: You do not have to devise ways of taking your mind off the journey, for an aeroplane gets you to your destination rapidly. | 你不必绞尽脑汁去分散旅途的注意力，因为飞机能迅速将你送达目的地。

lines.english: For a few hours, you settle back in a deep armchair to enjoy the flight.
lines.chinese: 几个小时里，你可以靠在舒适的扶手椅上享受飞行。
lines.raw: For a few hours, you settle back in a deep armchair to enjoy the flight. | 几个小时里，你可以靠在舒适的扶手椅上享受飞行。

lines.english: The real escapist can watch a film and sip champagne on some services.
lines.chinese: 真正的逃避现实者可以在某些航班上观看电影并品尝香槟。
lines.raw: The real escapist can watch a film and sip champagne on some services. | 真正的逃避现实者可以在某些航班上观看电影并品尝香槟。

lines.english: But even when such refinements are not available, there is plenty to keep you occupied.
lines.chinese: 但即使没有这些精致的服务，也有很多事情能让你保持忙碌。
lines.raw: But even when such refinements are not available, there is plenty to keep you occupied. | 但即使没有这些精致的服务，也有很多事情能让你保持忙碌。

lines.english: An aeroplane offers you an unusual and breathtaking view of the world.
lines.chinese: 飞机为你提供了独特而令人惊叹的世界景观。
lines.raw: An aeroplane offers you an unusual and breathtaking view of the world. | 飞机为你提供了独特而令人惊叹的世界景观。

lines.english: You soar effortlessly over high mountains and deep valleys.
lines.chinese: 你毫不费力地翱翔于高山深谷之上。
lines.raw: You soar effortlessly over high mountains and deep valleys. | 你毫不费力地翱翔于高山深谷之上。

lines.english: You really see the shape of the land.
lines.chinese: 你真切地看到了大地的轮廓。
lines.raw: You really see the shape of the land. | 你真切地看到了大地的轮廓。

lines.english: If the landscape is hidden from view,
lines.chinese: 如果风景被遮挡，
lines.raw: If the landscape is hidden from view, | 如果风景被遮挡，

lines.english: you can enjoy the extraordinary sight of unbroken cloud plains that stretch out for miles before you, while the sun shines brilliantly in a clear sky.
lines.chinese: 你可以欣赏到绵延数英里的连绵不断的云海奇景，同时阳光在晴朗的天空中灿烂地照耀。
lines.raw: you can enjoy the extraordinary sight of unbroken cloud plains that stretch out for miles before you, while the sun shines brilliantly in a clear sky. | 你可以欣赏到绵延数英里的连绵不断的云海奇景，同时阳光在晴朗的天空中灿烂地照耀。

lines.english: The journey is so smooth that there is nothing to prevent you from reading or sleeping.
lines.chinese: 旅途如此平稳，没有什么能阻止你阅读或睡觉。
lines.raw: The journey is so smooth that there is nothing to prevent you from reading or sleeping. | 旅途如此平稳，没有什么能阻止你阅读或睡觉。

lines.english: However you decide to spend your time, one thing is certain: you will arrive at your destination fresh and uncrumpled.
lines.chinese: 无论你决定如何度过时间，有一件事是肯定的：你将精神焕发、衣着整洁地抵达目的地。
lines.raw: However you decide to spend your time, one thing is certain: you will arrive at your destination fresh and uncrumpled. | 无论你决定如何度过时间，有一件事是肯定的：你将精神焕发、衣着整洁地抵达目的地。

lines.english: You will not have to spend the next few days recovering from a long and arduous journey.
lines.chinese: 你不必花接下来的几天来从漫长而艰辛的旅程中恢复。
lines.raw: You will not have to spend the next few days recovering from a long and arduous journey. | 你不必花接下来的几天来从漫长而艰辛的旅程中恢复。
